name: Rainbow
description: Double rainbows arching over a paper sky — every redraw re-bends the bands and trades their colors, sometimes upside-down.

code.style: --arc1: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --arc2: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color1)); --over: @p(0deg, 0deg, 180deg); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { transform: rotate(var(--over)); :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 10%; top: 24%; @size: 80%; border: calc(45px / @Y) solid var(--arc1); border-radius: 50%; clip-path: inset(0 0 52% 0); box-sizing: border-box; transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 24%; top: 38%; @size: 52%; border: calc(45px / @Y) solid var(--arc2); border-radius: 50%; clip-path: inset(0 0 44% 0); box-sizing: border-box; transition: ease 700ms; } } transition: ease 700ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
